title: August 2025 Transaction Data
body: "Please note this data shows what HM Land Registry has been able to process during the time period covered and is not necessarily a reflection of market activity.  In August:      HM Land Registry completed over 1,748,110 applications to change or query the Land Register    The South East topped the table of regional applications with 394,824    HM Land Registry completed 1,748,118 applications in August compared with 2,052,588 in July 2025 and 1,876,215 last August 2024, of which:     285,459 were applications for register updates compared with 313,380 in July   986,558 were applications for an official copy of a register compared with 1,184,040 in July   193,398 were search and hold queries (official searches) compared with 218,523 in July   94,756 were transactions for value compared with 94,452 in July   15,105 were postal applications from non-account holders compared with 15,530 in July.    Applications by region and country      Region/country June applications July applications August applications     South East 422,048 461,467 394,824   Greater London 349,946 381,098 318,096   North West 214,047 233,844 201,180   South West 181,091 198,510 170,973   West Midlands 161,477 174,925 149,516   Yorkshire and the Humber 151,505 163,555 139,516   East Midlands 141,668 153,087 129,634   North 94,997 106,620 88,145   East Anglia 80,777 87,041 75,440   Isles of Scilly 56 60 83   Wales 85,841 92,257 80,599   England and Wales (not assigned) 107 124 112   Total 1,883,560 2,052,588 1,748,118     Top 5 local authority areas   August 2025 applications     Top 5 Local  authority areas August applications     Birmingham 25,604   City of Westminster 21,387   Leeds 20,377   North Yorkshire 19,541   Buckinghamshire 17,680     Top 5 customers   August 2025 applications     Top 5 customers August applications     InfoTrack Limited 195,846   Enact 30,713   Landmark Information Group Ltd 28,878   O’Neill Patient 27,097   Orbital Witness Limited 26,326     Access the full dataset on our Use land and property data service.  Next publication   Transaction Data is published on the 15th working day of each month. The September 2025 data will be published at 11am on Tuesday 21 October 2025. "
